title: Melsonby Hoard Wins Archaeology Rescue Project Award
description: The teamwork behind the discovery of the Melsonby Hoard has been recognised with a national award from one of the UK's leading archaeological

title: ‘A world chained to fossil fuels’: Does the war on Iran prove it’s time to quit oil for good?
description: After Iran warned that the Strait of Hormuz was closed for navigation, climate groups have urged governments to focus on clean energy.

title: Tiny fossil rewrites history of mysterious group of dinosaurs
description: Scientists have discovered one of the smallest dinosaurs unearthed in South America. The discovery provides valuable insights into the evolution of a group of bird-like dinosaurs known as alvarezsaurs.

title: Iran's Ancient Religious Landscape Before Islam
description: Long before Islam and even before Zoroastrianism, Iranian tribes followed an ancient Indo-Iranian religion

title: Police stumble upon ancient shipwreck amid routine patrol, keep location secret to deter looters
description: Italian authorities discovered a late Roman merchant shipwreck carrying amphorae during a routine patrol in the Ionian Sea. The vessel dates to roughly 284 A.D. to 641 A.D.
